Test_Case_Description: Splash Screen load and unauthenticated routing
Appium_Action: Launch app -> Wait for splash -> Check current activity
Click Login button without entering data
Actual_Result: Validation errors 'Please enter your email' and 'Please enter a password' displayed
Successfully routed to FarmerHomeScreen and data loaded

Appium_Action: Navigate to Register -> Enter details -> Select Owner -> Submit
Expected_Result: Account created in DB -> Route to Login/Home
Actual_Result: Account created in Supabase but requires email validation/redirect
Vehicles list filtered to Pune successfully
Vehicles list filtered to Tractor successfully

Expected_Result: Navigate to VehicleDetailScreen with correct data
Actual_Result: Vehicle detail screen loaded with images and specs

Appium_Action: Select Dates -> Select Cash -> Confirm Booking
Expected_Result: Booking created in DB -> Success dialog shown
Actual_Result: Booking created successfully with pending status

Appium_Action: Select Dates -> Select UPI -> Confirm Booking
Actual_Result: No payment gateway opened; marked success directly

Appium_Action: Go to Booking History -> Click Cancel -> Enter Reason
Login as Owner -> Click Add Vehicle -> Fill form -> Submit
Expected_Result: Vehicle created in DB with is_approved=false
Actual_Result: Vehicle added but pending admin approval

Appium_Action: Click switch on approved vehicle card
Go to Manage Bookings -> Click Confirm on pending booking
Expected_Result: Booking status updated to confirmed -> Farmer notified
Display total and monthly earnings from DB

Appium_Action: Login as Admin -> Go to Manage Vehicles -> Click Approve
Expected_Result: Vehicle is_approved updated to true in DB
Actual_Result: Vehicle approved and visible to Farmers

Appium_Action: Attempt direct API request to fetch users/vehicles without token
Remarks: CRITICAL: Row Level Security is disabled on tables allowing unauthorized access
